title: helothrix axillaris
intro: Helothrix axillaris, also known as the "Wild Yam", is a type of plant that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and other health issues. The health benefits of Helothrix axillaris include reducing stress, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Helothrix axillaris can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
